_runbook:
INCIDENT RUNBOOK — How to show an in-app status banner: 1) Edit this file on GitHub (github.com >
  your-repo > status.json > pencil icon). 2) Set banner.active to true. 3) Write a user-facing message in
  banner.message. 4) Set banner.type to 'warning', 'error', or 'info'. 5) Optionally add a banner.link URL. 6) Commit
  directly to main. Changes propagate in ~5 min (GitHub raw CDN cache). To clear the banner: set banner.active to
  false and commit.

banner.message:
Salling Group API oplever i øjeblikket problemer. Produktdata kan være utilgængelige — dette skyldes
   ikke os.
